title: Legendary Arsenal
description: Add 200+ iconic geek weapons to your world! Explore and find Weapon Crates, which spawn naturally and drop a random powerful weapon when broken.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5587e32d69ba3549779be5b707a21e3af18521bb.png)

![many of weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ab970fd9a0f5fa598b6d0042f4c3d21ab36fdc.png)
# ⚔️This mod adds 200+ iconic weapons from the geek universe.
![Weapon Crate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec539d3da941b6bf4a2029d0548fd8212c9b6c41.png)

## Explore the world to find the Weapon Crate, a special block that spawns naturally. Break it to obtain one of these powerful items!

### The mod also introduces three special items

### Amulet of Twins: Hold the weapon in your left hand and the amulet in your right hand, then right-click to duplicate the weapon. It can be used in weapons that are classified as Twin Weapons.

![Amulet of Twins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aaa38508aa5e386cd2cedb37294252af239a4fb.jpeg)

### Eye of Illusion: Used in the smithing table to change only the visual appearance of an item, without altering its stats.

![Eye of Illusion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b63041d8600d8a2133aace1d1bfa6d7697a04d4c.jpeg)


### Amulet of Upgrade: Sets the weapon to its maximum level when combined in the smithing table.

![Amulet of Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e7ce58d4e1440b8a2878622a61aeb8af73986f7.jpeg)



### ⚔️ This mod also features integration with the:


### [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)

### [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

### ✨Weapons glow in the dark when using resourcepack [Glow Legendary Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glow-weapons).
